name: Peach-Blueberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Combine 1/2 cup sliced fresh peaches, 1/2 cup fresh blueberries, and remaining ingredients in a small saucepan. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 10 minutes. Stir in the reserved peaches and blueberries. Serve fruit sauce warm over ice cream, pancakes, waffles, or pound cake. Yield: 1-1/2 cups.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
Combine 1/2 cup peaches, 1/2 cup blueberries, and remaining ingredients in a 2-quart glass bowl. Cover with heavy-duty plastic wrap and microwave at HIGH for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring once. Stir in the reserved peaches and blueberries. Serve fruit sauce warm over ice cream, pancakes, waffles, or pound cake.
